markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on performance, content pipeline, and programmatic SEO (PSEO) strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**PSEO Volume Blocked by Internal Capacity:** The planned PSEO volume is stalled by SchoolAI's internal capacity for image creation and content review.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [**AI-Generated Images Proposed:** GrowthX proposed using its workflow to generate PSEO images, which could solve the capacity bottleneck by adhering to SchoolAI's brand guidelines and incorporating product assets.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [**New LLM Discovery Channel:** A SchoolAI "Space" was cited by an LLM, confirming that individual tools can be discovered and suggested, opening a powerful new channel for user acquisition.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
  - [**Performance Reporting Shift:** Reporting will pivot from week-over-week to month-over-month analysis starting in November to provide more strategic insights.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline & Performance

  - [**Editorial Article Shortage:** The editorial pipeline is low (1 article staged vs. 10/week target), likely due to report card season. Nikki pinged the team to submit finished articles.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [**October Performance:**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [Clicks are up 4.9% WoW, projecting \~128K for the month.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
      - [This is a strong result given widespread industry volatility, including a Google Search Console data freeze from Oct 15–17.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**Reporting Pivot:**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Decision:** Shift performance reporting to a month-over-month (MoM) view, starting with the November sync.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
      - [**Rationale:** To gain strategic insights from larger trends, moving beyond weekly noise. Weekly anomalies will still be flagged.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)

### PSEO Strategy & Implementation

  - [**Problem:** PSEO is blocked by SchoolAI's internal capacity, not a strategic concern.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
      - [**Bottlenecks:** Image creation (Carrington) and content review.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution: AI-Generated Images**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [GrowthX can use its workflow to generate PSEO images, solving the design bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
      - [**Method:** Feed the workflow SchoolAI's brand guidelines, reference image URLs, and product assets (e.g., dashboard screenshots, "space tiles") for integration.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution: AI-Assisted Content Review**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [Nikki will test using SchoolAI's new Chrome extension (in beta) to review PSEO articles.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [**Goal:** Automate checks for factual accuracy and product capability claims.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1022.0)
      - [**Enabler:** An updated product capabilities doc will serve as the source of truth for the AI to prevent "hallucinations."](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)

### New Growth Opportunities

  - [**Diversify Top Content:**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "AI for Math" article accounts for \~50% of blog sessions, creating a single point of failure.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1597.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** Replicate its success formula by creating similar guides for other subjects.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Resource:** Nikki will provide the "Starter Packs" database (coach-created lists of Spaces for specific subjects) to inform new content.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
  - [**LLM Discovery of Spaces:**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [**Finding:** A SchoolAI "Space" ("Historic figure chatbot") was cited by an LLM, generating 6 sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [**Significance:** This confirms individual tools can be discovered, not just the platform.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1787.0)
      - [**Opportunity:** PSEO for Spaces could be a major differentiator, enabling SchoolAI to break out of the commoditized competitor cluster.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1882.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Nikki:**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [Consult Carrington (design) on image capacity and provide art direction guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
      - [Provide the "Starter Packs" database to inform new subject-specific guides.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [Test the Chrome extension for PSEO article review.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=978.0)
      - [Update the product capabilities doc to prevent AI hallucinations.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1086.0)
  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [File an engineering ticket to enable product image integration in the AI-generated image workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)
      - [Find the query context for the LLM citation of the "Historic figure chatbot" Space.](https://fathom.video/share/akQck4SXYYySdKAu9_zA1Zp3n3eKR9_B?tab=summary&timestamp=1858.0)
